(alias) class KatmanError<TCode extends string = string, TData = unknown>
import KatmanError

(alias) new KatmanError<"NOT_FOUND", unknown>(code: "NOT_FOUND", options?: KatmanErrorOptions<unknown> | undefined): KatmanError<"NOT_FOUND", unknown>
import KatmanError

(alias) new KatmanError<"UNAUTHORIZED", unknown>(code: "UNAUTHORIZED", options?: KatmanErrorOptions<unknown> | undefined): KatmanError<"UNAUTHORIZED", unknown>
import KatmanError

(alias) new KatmanError<"BAD_REQUEST", unknown>(code: "BAD_REQUEST", options?: KatmanErrorOptions<unknown> | undefined): KatmanError<"BAD_REQUEST", unknown>
import KatmanError
